tagline: Daily public-price snapshots for five sample addresses in LiveOak markets, with FCC exact-address verification wired as the next upgrade.

dataConfidenceLegend.verified_public_page: Pulled from a public pricing or coverage page.
dataConfidenceLegend.provisional_market_level: Inferred from city or market coverage, not yet confirmed on the exact FCC address record.
dataConfidenceLegend.blocked_exact_address: Needs an authenticated FCC lookup or a provider checkout flow that will allow automation.

globalBlockers.title: FCC exact-address provider lookups are not automated yet
globalBlockers.detail: The FCC Broadband Map APIs that expose structured provider data require authentication, and the public site does not expose a clean anonymous endpoint from this environment.

globalBlockers.title: Some provider checkout flows are protected
globalBlockers.detail: LiveOak's order page is behind Cloudflare in this environment, so exact address pricing needs browser automation in GitHub Actions or a manual session.

addresses.footprintNote: Chosen as a sample address inside a LiveOak service city. Exact address verification on the FCC record is still pending.

liveoak.name: LiveOak Fiber
notes: LiveOak publishes pricing publicly, but exact address availability still needs the FCC location lookup or the order flow.
Some market landing pages advertise different tier mixes, so exact address results matter.

xfinity.name: Xfinity
notes: Seeded from Xfinity's published online pricing, not an exact-address cart result.
Georgia sample addresses use Xfinity as the provisional cable competitor until FCC exact-address records are connected.

cox.name: Cox
notes: Seeded from published plan pricing, not an exact-address checkout result.
Florida sample addresses use Cox as the provisional cable competitor until FCC exact-address records are connected.

tmobile-home.name: T-Mobile Home Internet
notes: T-Mobile publishes plan pricing publicly, but availability and speeds can vary by exact address.
The address-level offer needs a live availability check to move from provisional to exact.

starlink.name: Starlink
notes: Only Starlink is tracked on the satellite side, per scope.
Starlink runs address-sensitive promos in some areas, so the exact address result may differ from the public baseline.
